title: sclarea spinosa
intro: Sclarea spinosa, also known as Dalmatian sage or white clary, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Sclarea spinosa include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its ability to soothe respiratory problems and reduce stress. Sclarea spinosa can be prepared as an essential oil, tea, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
